etymology.description: 禾(禾) (hé, "grain") + 子(子) (zǐ, "child") = grain producing offspring -> season
etymology.interpretation: The character 季 represents the growth cycle of crops yielding new life, symbolized by grain (禾) producing offspring (子), thereby conveying the idea of a 'season' as a time for specific agricultural activities.

examples.chinese: 秋天是一个美丽的季节(秋天是一個美麗的季節)。
examples.pinyin: Qiūtiān shì yī gè měilì de jìjié.

examples.chinese: 每个季节都有不同的颜色(每個季節都有不同的顏色)。
examples.pinyin: Měi gè jìjié dōu yǒu bùtóng de yánsè.

examples.chinese: 春季温暖(春季溫暖)，适合种植(適合種植)。
examples.english: Spring is warm, suitable for planting.
